evidence: "I have not laughed so hard or so much in years. Love this dude."
"A fantastic movie that most people will sadly hate. With Miranda July, you either appreciate her sensibility or you walk away."
"Some people will find parts of the film slow-moving (it captures certain aspects of the family's ski trip with an almost grueling verisimilitude)..."
"Based solely on the wonderful lunacy of the storytelling and film-making technique in these movies..."
"...but I am a little surprised and disappointed by the failure to include digital copies."
"...but the two leads are so droll (and freaking hysterical) that my partner and I tore through these episodes in no time."
"The movies look and sound fantastic in 4K..."
"...I have to knock off one star for video quality that is really problematic in places."
"...fans of Japanese film, Quentin Tarantino (especially Kill Bill, Vol. 1 &2)..."
"...the use of music (especially The Talking Heads) is masterful."
"...this examination of masculine and feminine stereotypes...was one of the best films released last year."

summary: The user has a strong preference for comedy and drama, often appreciating films that evoke laughter and emotional depth. They value sensory experiences, particularly in music and visuals, while showing a mixed response to narrative complexity and pacing.
